nodes.label: Note On
nodes.description: MIDI note-on triggers startVoice(), captures mod chain values, computes per-voice coefficients

nodes.label: Note Off
nodes.description: MIDI note-off sets state to RELEASE (polyphonic) or checked via keymap (monophonic)

nodes.label: Mod Chain Capture
nodes.description: Reads all 5 mod chain values via getConstantVoiceValue() at note-on time

nodes.label: Coefficient Calculation
nodes.description: Computes per-voice attack/decay/release coefficients from parameters * mod values

nodes.label: ATTACK
nodes.description: current_value = attackBase + current_value * attackCoef; exponential curve shaped by AttackCurve

nodes.label: HOLD
nodes.description: Holds current_value at attackLevel for holdTimeSamples

nodes.label: DECAY
nodes.description: current_value = decayBase + current_value * decayCoef; shaped by DecayCurve via targetRatioDR

nodes.label: SUSTAIN
nodes.description: current_value = sustain * modValues[SustainLevelChain]; fast-path with linear ramp in calculateBlock

nodes.label: RELEASE
nodes.description: current_value = releaseBase + current_value * releaseCoef; same curve as DECAY (shared targetRatioDR)

nodes.label: RETRIGGER
nodes.description: Monophonic only: default immediately transitions to ATTACK from current value

nodes.label: IDLE
nodes.description: Envelope inactive; voice can be killed (polyphonic) or continues (monophonic)

nodes.label: Monophonic?
nodes.description: Switches between shared monophonic state and per-voice state

nodes.label: Retrigger?
nodes.description: In monophonic mode: restart envelope or continue from current position

nodes.label: AttackLevel > Sustain?
nodes.description: If attackLevel <= sustain, ATTACK transitions directly to SUSTAIN, skipping HOLD and DECAY

nodes.label: Internal Buffer
nodes.description: Per-sample envelope values written at control rate

nodes.label: Apply to Voice Buffer
nodes.description: applyTimeModulation() multiplies envelope values into the voice audio buffer

nodes.label: Attack
nodes.description: Attack time in ms (0-20000); converted to coefficient via calcCoef at control rate

nodes.label: AttackLevel
nodes.description: Peak level in dB (-100 to 0); stored as linear gain internally

nodes.label: Hold
nodes.description: Hold time in ms (0-20000); converted to samples at control rate; no modulation chain

nodes.label: Decay
nodes.description: Decay time in ms (1-20000); converted to coefficient via calcCoef

nodes.label: Sustain
nodes.description: Sustain level in dB (-100 to 0); stored as linear gain; 0 dB = unity, -100 dB = silence

nodes.label: Release
nodes.description: Release time in ms (1-20000); converted to coefficient; shares DecayCurve shaping

nodes.label: AttackCurve
nodes.description: 0.0=concave (log), 0.5=linear, 1.0=convex (exp); controls attackBase power curve coefficient

nodes.label: DecayCurve
nodes.description: 0.0=steep exponential, 1.0=gentler; controls targetRatioDR for both decay and release

nodes.label: Monophonic
nodes.description: Toggle: shared envelope state for all voices; disables voice killing

nodes.label: Retrigger
nodes.description: Toggle (monophonic only): restart envelope on new note or continue from current state

nodes.label: EcoMode (vestigial)
nodes.description: Vestigial: returns hardcoded 1.0, setter is a no-op. Downsampling is global.

nodes.label: AttackTimeModulation
nodes.description: VoiceStartModulator chain; multiplies attack time (gain mode on ms value)

nodes.label: AttackLevelModulation
nodes.description: VoiceStartModulator chain; multiplies attack level (gain mode on linear gain)

nodes.label: DecayTimeModulation
nodes.description: VoiceStartModulator chain; multiplies decay time (gain mode on ms value)

nodes.label: SustainLevelModulation
nodes.description: VoiceStartModulator chain; multiplies sustain level (gain mode on linear gain)

nodes.label: ReleaseTimeModulation
nodes.description: VoiceStartModulator chain; multiplies release time (gain mode on ms value)
